sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁמונים שׁמנים

Transliteration: shemônı̂ym shemônı̂ym

Phonetic: shem-o-neem'

BDB Definition:

  1. eighty, fourscore
    1. eighty (as cardinal number)
    2. eightieth (as ordinal number)
    3. in combination with other numbers

Origin: mult from H8083

TWOT entry: 2411b

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
